prose: Fukui reactivity indices for phenol were computed using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet); cation at charge +1, mult 2; anion at charge −1, mult 2. Geometry: user-supplied phenol.xyz, used as-is (no re-optimization). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). The headline value reported is the maximum f⁺ (electrophilic attack index) = 2.1028319, located at atom 3 (ortho carbon). The most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (oxygen), f⁻ = 0.16201477. Fukui charge conservation checks both passed: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. Integrity: trustworthy = true. No warnings reported by the engine.
